steps.title: Read the y-intercept from the graph
steps.content: From the graph, the line crosses the y-axis at the point (0, 10).

steps.title: Substitute the y-intercept into the equation and solve for B
steps.content:
Substitute the point (0, 10) into $10x + By = 50$:

$$10(0) + B(10) = 50$$
$$10B = 50$$
$$B = 5$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
